sentences.arabic: زَارَ خَالِدٌ الْمُسْتَشْفَى لِإِجْرَاءِ الْفَحْصِ السَّنَوِيِّ الشَّامِلِ.
sentences.translation: Khalid je posjetio bolnicu kako bi obavio godišnji sistematski pregled.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid visited the hospital to perform the annual comprehensive checkup.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثَ الطَّبِيبُ مَعَهُ عَنْ أَهَمِّيَّةِ الْوِقَايَةِ مِنَ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Doktor je s njim razgovarao o važnosti prevencije bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor spoke with him about the importance of disease prevention.

sentences.arabic: الْوِقَايَةُ خَيْرٌ مِنَ الْعِلَاجِ فِي كُلِّ الْأَوْقَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Prevencija je bolja od liječenja u svako vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Prevention is better than cure at all times.
